title: DMBA Venture Studio Showcase: Five Ventures. One Belief. The Future Is Ours to Build.
location: CCA Main Building, Nave Presentation Space
description:
The future belongs to people who can hold complexity without flinching—who can curate signal from noise, design for systems, and lead with as much empathy as ambition. In a world that keeps changing the rules, curiosity, creativity, and emotional intelligence are the sharpest tools in the room. CCA DMBA spends two years honing them. These ventures are the proof.

The DMBA Venture Studio Showcase is back—five ventures, each built from months of deep research, real-world signal validation, and relentless iteration. Business plans that understand the world as it is and design for it as it could be.

This year's cohort reflects a particular kind of ambition: businesses rooted in the body, the neighborhood, the community, and the everyday. The kind of ideas that make you wonder why no one built them sooner.
